name: engram-compare-cf
description: Capability comparison harness: engram-kernel (live-heap snapshot REPL) vs Cloudflare Sandbox (Container+DO). Runs identical probes against both substrates.

scripts.check: node --check engram-adapter.mjs && node --check cf-sandbox-adapter.mjs && node --check probes.mjs && node --check scale.mjs && node --check run.mjs

//: ws is resolved via a node_modules symlink to ../../apps/kernel/node_modules (created on setup: ln -sfn ../../apps/kernel/node_modules node_modules). Re-create it if missing.
